summary: Iteration 8: Calendar/Agenda View Feature Testing - All features working correctly on mobile viewport (400x800). Calendar view shows French month names, weekday headers, reservation dots on dates with bookings, and event details on date selection.

issues: Filter chips wrap to 2 rows on mobile (400px width) - Toutes/En attente/Confirmées/En cours on row 1, Terminées on row 2. This is acceptable responsive behavior but could be improved with horizontal scroll.

filter_tabs_horizontal_layout.details: Filter tabs (Toutes, En attente, Confirmées, En cours, Terminées) display as horizontal chips, wrapping to 2 rows on mobile viewport

view_toggle_buttons.details: List/Calendar toggle button group visible in header next to 'Mes Locations' title. Icons clearly show list and calendar options.

calendar_view_display.details: Calendar view shows monthly grid with French month name (e.g., 'février 2026', 'octobre 2026'), weekday headers (Lun-Dim), and date cells

calendar_month_navigation.details: Forward/backward month navigation arrows work correctly. Successfully navigated from February to October 2026.

calendar_date_selection.details: Clicking on a date shows section below with either 'Aucune réservation' or reservation details

reservation_dots_on_calendar.details: October 2026 calendar shows colored dots on dates 15-18 indicating the Volkswagen Golf reservation period

event_card_on_date_click.details: Clicking Oct 15 shows event card with 'Volkswagen Golf', status 'Espèces en attente', dates '15 oct. - 18 oct. 2026', '3 jours', and 'CHF 195.00'

switch_back_to_list_view.details: Clicking list toggle button returns to list view with filter tabs and reservation cards displayed correctly

critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes in reservations.tsx may not render as HTML attributes in React Native Web - this is expected RN Web behavior, not a bug
seed_data_used: Existing Volkswagen Golf reservation (Oct 15-18, 2026) for client1@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar/agenda view feature fully operational. All test scenarios passed: horizontal filter tabs, list/calendar toggle, French month names, weekday headers, month navigation, date selection with event details, reservation dots on booking dates, and switching back to list view.

test_evidence.list_view: Shows 'Mes Locations' with '1 reservation', filter chips (Toutes/En attente/Confirmées/En cours/Terminées), and Volkswagen Golf reservation card
test_evidence.calendar_february: Calendar shows 'Février 2026' with French weekday headers (LUN-DIM), today (25) highlighted with purple background
test_evidence.calendar_october: Calendar shows 'Octobre 2026' with colored dots on dates 15, 16, 17, 18 indicating reservation period
test_evidence.date_selection: Selected 'Jeudi 15 Octobre 2026' shows event card with Volkswagen Golf details, status, dates, duration (3 jours), and price (CHF 195.00)
